name: MORGAN STANLEY
summary: Morgan Stanley is a global financial services firm that advises, originates, trades, manages and distributes capital for governments, institutions and individuals. Operating through three business segments—Institutional Securities, Wealth Management, and Investment Management—the firm provides products and services including investment banking, brokerage, asset management, and wealth management. It serves corporations, governments, financial institutions and individuals from headquarters in New York City and offices worldwide.

products.name: Institutional Securities
products.description: Capital markets, investment banking, sales and trading services for institutional clients including corporations and governments.

products.name: Wealth Management
products.description: Financial planning, brokerage, and investment advisory services for individual and institutional clients.

products.name: Investment Management
products.description: Asset management products and services including traditional and alternative investment strategies.
